title: Horizon TPA
description: a very simple and lightweight tpa plugin
body:
**Features:
✅ /tpa, /tpaccept, /tpdeny, /tpahere – Fully functional teleport system
✅ Customizable delays & cooldowns

Perfect for:
✔️ Survival SMPs
✔️ Towny & Factions
✔️ Skyblock & Minigames**

Lightweight & lag-free – Works on any Spigot/Paper server!

Download now and enhance your server’s teleportation system!
How it looks when someone requests to teleport to you:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98a43e0fb0d1d43dcfcb08a376fd88931492b544.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b12f16d909767bea4f57b6a35c99115b74887738.png)
How it looks when you deny a request:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b404fa3bc03cc0d0fcec459177a000f83604a25d.png)
How it looks when you send a request but have already sent one:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25f49a0352534666f59473000567e91db9f482aa.png)
How it looks when you spam the /tpa command: (edit the time in config.yml)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a506923dd685a6105ed70814921e98446f488223.png)
